channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Did Live Nation punish a venue by taking Billie Eilish away?
item.description: John Abbamondi had orders to let the CEO of Ticketmaster down easy. In April 2021, Abbamondi was the CEO of BSE Global, the company that ran Brooklyn arena the Barclays Center. BSE Global's existing Ticketmaster contract would expire at the end of September, and Abbamondi and his team had evaluated proposals from SeatGeek, AXS, and […]

item.title: I've been hands-on with the Google Pixel 10a, and the 9a for AU$570 is looking like the better buy — here's why
item.description: Google’s Pixel A-series has historically provided great value for money — but with the Pixel 10a almost identical to its predecessor, a discounted Pixel 9a is the clear choice.

item.title: Apple says 'life is just better on a Mac' — and the $599 MacBook Neo may be its smartest pitch yet
item.description: Just as polished, but a much, much lower price

item.title: A new video from the White House mixes Call of Duty footage with actual video of Iran strikes
item.description: On Wednesday, the White House posted a video of actual military strikes on Iran in the style usually seen in Call of Duty highlight videos, and started the video with a clip from Call of Duty. The real-life footage of missiles and other munitions hitting targets in Iran shows clips seen in other Trump administration […]

item.title: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic, but his explanation raises more questions than it answers
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said Wednesday that his company's investments in OpenAI and Anthropic will likely be its last — but his explanation may not tell the whole story.

item.title: Hundreds of Google and OpenAI employees sign open letter urging limits on military AI
item.description: Hundreds of employees at Google and OpenAI have signed a public letter urging their companies to set firm boundaries on how AI can be used by the military

item.title: AI treated nuclear threats as a routine strategy in 95% of war games, according to new research
item.description: A new study suggests AI models frequently escalate to nuclear threats in simulated conflicts, likely mirroring the strategic thinking and war game scenarios that dominate their training data.

item.title: Google hit with shocking wrongful death lawsuit over Gemini AI chatbot
item.description: Google is being sued after Gemini sent a user down a delusional rabbit hole which ended with their death.
